'''Baro''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Councillor/Legends|councillor]] from [[Zila]] on [[Garos IV]] during the [[New Republic era|era]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was deeply concerned with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activities in Zila.

{{Char-stub}}
